case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARIO ALBERTO MOLINA ARGUMEDO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED JUN-27-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUMEDO, MARIO ALBERTO MOLINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARGUMEDO, MARIO ALBERTO MOLINA $806.02 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $891.02 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUMEDO, MARIO ALBERTO MOLINA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $806.02 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUMEDO, MARIO ALBERTO MOLINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
